name: Autumn Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first nine ingredients (egg, butter, sugar, yogurt or lemon juice and milk, milk, bran, grated apple, raisins, rolled oats).
2. Sift the dry ingredients together.
3. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the bran mixture, stirring until just moistened.
4. Spoon the batter into muffin cups.
5. Bake at 425°F for about 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Makes 12 small muffins.
7. Each muffin contains approximately 114 calories, one starch choice, half a fruit serving, and half a fat serving.
